core_principle.statement: Layout is an architectural engineering structure for organizing information, not a visual composition technique.
core_principle.interpretation: Every layout must behave like a structured architectural blueprint.

layout_hierarchy.definition: Top-level structure defining overall page architecture
layout_hierarchy.role: Defines global boundaries and system alignment

layout_hierarchy.definition: Logical grouping of related system components

layout_principles.name: Structural Hierarchy
layout_principles.description: Every layout must clearly express system hierarchy from top to bottom.

layout_principles.name: Grid Discipline
layout_principles.description: All elements must strictly align to the 12-column grid system.

layout_principles.name: Modular Construction
layout_principles.description: Layouts must be composed of reusable system modules.

layout_principles.name: Spatial Engineering
layout_principles.description: Whitespace is treated as architectural space, not empty design.

layout_principles.name: Predictable Flow
layout_principles.description: User navigation must follow logical engineering structure.

spacing_system.rule: All spacing must be derived from base unit multiples

alignment_rules.module_alignment: All modules must snap to grid intersections
alignment_rules.content_alignment: Typography must follow grid baseline system

responsive_behavior.rule: Layout hierarchy must remain intact on all screen sizes
responsive_behavior.adaptation: Columns collapse but system logic remains unchanged

visual_behavior.focus: Guided toward system structure, not visual attraction

user_perception: This system is predictable and structured
This feels like a technical blueprint, not a design

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure all layouts behave like architectural engineering blueprints
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent perception of AvizSazeh as a structured system-based engineering brand
